title: 8Pcs Jar Opener Gripper Pads, Rubber Jar Grippers Anti-slip Coasters Kitchen Gadget Multi-function Bottle Lid Opener Jar Opener for Seniors with Weak Hands or Less Strength
description:
Package Content: You will obtain 8pcs jar opener in 2 shapes & 4 colors, including 4 round jar opener gripper pads and 4 square jar opener gripper pads. Rubber jar opener grippers will add a touch of brightness and beauty to your home and kitchen.
Kitchen Good Helper: These jar openers have textures on the surface to create greater friction with jar lids. This gripper has excellent grip to easily open all sizes of jar lids for you.
Anti-slip Material: The rubber jar opener is made of high-quality rubber with a soft texture, which is durability and flexibility. Jar openers top rated for seniors won't tear and provide a secure grip for you to open the jar, making rubber grippers for opening jars easy for seniors with weak hands or less strength to use.
Easy To Use: Simply place the bottle openers for seniors on the lid, twist in the indicated direction and the lid will be easily unscrewed. If you have trouble opening jars normally, then jar grippers for opening jars will undoubtedly be a great helper for you.
Wide Application: In addition to being used as jar grippers to open bottles, cans, sealed containers, etc; jar opener for seniors with arthritis can also serve as heat insulation coasters, anti-scalding mats or wraps for hot lid and hot handle to avoid scalding your hands. I believe the jar openers top rated for seniors will become a handy gadget in your kitchen.
reviews_5s: At less than 90 cents per piece, these are a good value. I find that most rubber grippers eventually get brittle and crack after use, so getting eight of them should hopefully last me longer than the 3 in a pack most sellers offer. They do feel very rubbery and tacky. (Tacky is a good thing here, ;) I stash a few of these in my kitchen, in my tool kit, and in my room ~ they're a must have for those who have trouble with weak grip strength!They are a bit thinner than my old ones, but I expected that for the price. They work well to open jars and caps from bottled drinks.Although thinner than what I’m used to, they work like a charmWas soll ich sagen.....ich bekomme jetzt alle Flaschen und Gläser auf !
